{%- comment -%} Overrides the competitive-verifier theme's toppage_body.html: - displays paths with the leading "src/" stripped (headers are included with bare names via -I src); - Catch2 unit tests (src/*.test.cpp) are not verification files, so they get a 🧪 marker instead of the not-verified warning icon. {%- endcomment -%} {%- if page.data.coverage -%}

Coverage

{%- assign coverage_report_href = "/coverage/" | relative_url -%} {%- include coverage_summary.html coverage=page.data.coverage report_href=coverage_report_href -%} {%- endif -%} {%- for top in page.data.top -%}

{{ top.type }}

{%- for category in top.categories -%} {%- assign category_name = category.name | remove_first: "src/" -%} {%- if category_name != "" -%}

{{ category_name }}

{%- endif -%}
    {%- for item in category.pages -%} {%- assign name = item.path | remove_first: "src/" -%} {%- if item.title -%} {%- capture link_title -%}{{item.title | xml_escape }} ({{ name | xml_escape }}){%- endcapture -%} {%- else -%} {%- capture link_title -%}{{name | xml_escape }}{%- endcapture -%} {%- endif -%} {%- if item.coverage -%} {%- assign coverage_percent = item.coverage.rate | times: 100 -%} {%- capture coverage_span -%}{{ coverage_percent | round: 1 }}%{%- endcapture -%} {%- else -%} {%- assign coverage_span = "" -%} {%- endif -%} {%- if top.type == "Library Files" and item.path contains ".test.cpp" -%}
  • 🧪 {{ link_title | xml_escape }}
    • {%- else -%}
  • {{ site.icons[item.icon] }} {{ link_title | xml_escape }}{{ coverage_span }}
    • {%- endif -%} {%- endfor -%}
{%- endfor -%} {%- endfor -%}
